Terms of Service

Last updated: January 1, 2024

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing and using GameGuidePro (gameguidepro.com), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not agree to these Terms, please do not use the Site.

2. Use of the Site

You may use the Site for personal, non-commercial purposes. You agree not to:

  • Copy, reproduce, or redistribute our content without prior written permission
  • Use automated tools (bots, scrapers) to access the Site
  • Attempt to interfere with the proper functioning of the Site
  • Use the Site for any unlawful purpose

3. Content Accuracy

We strive for accuracy in all our guides. However, game content may change with updates and patches. We provide no guarantee that all information will be current at all times. Guides are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind.

4. Intellectual Property

All content on GameGuidePro, including text, graphics, logos, and code, is the property of GameGuidePro or its content creators and is protected by copyright. Game names, logos, and images referenced in our guides are the property of their respective owners.

5. Third-Party Links & Advertising

The Site contains links to third-party websites and advertisements served by Google AdSense. We are not responsible for the content, privacy practices, or policies of third-party sites or advertisers.

6. Disclaimer of Warranties

The Site is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis. We make no warranties, express or implied, regarding the Site's availability, accuracy, or fitness for a particular purpose.

7. Limitation of Liability

To the fullest extent permitted by law, GameGuidePro and its team shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the Site.

8. Indemnification

You agree to indemnify and hold harmless GameGuidePro from any claims arising from your use of the Site or violation of these Terms.

9. Changes to Terms

We may modify these Terms at any time. Continued use of the Site after changes constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.

10. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by applicable law. Any disputes shall be resolved in the appropriate courts.

11. Contact

For questions about these Terms, contact us at legal@gameguidepro.com.

Your ultimate game walkthrough & strategy hub.
